data.content: Shipped commit 01067b4322e8 to main. Merged codex/foolery-c4cc which tightens hierarchical queue beat labels by stripping project prefix from dotted aliases (e.g. knots-562b.1 → 562b.1). CI green on main (run 23289934106). Files changed: src/lib/beat-display.ts, src/lib/__tests__/beat-display.test.ts.
